name: JoAi: Set Notification Preference

description.en: Enable or disable notifications for a specific app and channel.
description.de: Benachrichtigungen für eine bestimmte App und einen Kanal aktivieren oder deaktivieren.
description.es: Enable or disable notifications for a specific app and channel.
description.fr: Enable or disable notifications for a specific app and channel.
description.ro: Enable or disable notifications for a specific app and channel.
description.it: Enable or disable notifications for a specific app and channel.

bot: Saves a notification preference for an app+channel combination. Key format: notifications.{app}.{channel} (e.g. notifications.signature.email). Value is 'true' or 'false'.

description.en: App to configure (e.g. signature, challenge, shop).
description.de: App, die konfiguriert werden soll (z.B. signature, challenge, shop).
description.es: App to configure (e.g. signature, challenge, shop).
description.fr: App to configure (e.g. signature, challenge, shop).
description.ro: App to configure (e.g. signature, challenge, shop).
description.it: App to configure (e.g. signature, challenge, shop).

inputs.name: Enabled

description.en: Turn this notification on or off.
description.es: Turn this notification on or off.
description.fr: Turn this notification on or off.
description.ro: Turn this notification on or off.
description.it: Turn this notification on or off.

inputs.bot: Whether to enable (true) or disable (false) the notification.
